- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: Recreated after scaffold overwrite; file is present and current.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Confirmed Vite + React + TypeScript app for VGC flashcards, mobile + desktop responsive, local progress tracking with no accounts, and two card types (damage and speed).

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Created Vite React TypeScript project in the workspace root and installed dependencies.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented MVP flashcard simulator with damage and speed cards, anonymous local user id, local progress persistence, responsive UI, and extension-ready folder structure.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions were specified by setup guidance.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Build and lint pass successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Added and launched a background VS Code task to run the dev server.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: User confirmed debug mode; launch configuration was added and started.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README and this instructions file are present and updated for current project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
